title: Over 2,000 Syrian Kurds flee Kobani as Islamic State advances, Kurdish official says
strengths: Direct town-bounded report of civilians leaving as street fighting reached the center.
limitations: Reports evacuees, not a full census of everyone still present in town.
notes: Used as the first city-core civilian exposure node.

title: Turkey says Syria town about to fall as Islamic State advances
strengths: Provides both a town-core residual population estimate and regional flight context within the same reporting window.
limitations: The 180,000 regional displacement figure is not a town denominator; the reported 400 deaths combine civilians and fighters.
notes: Used for the 2014-10-08 residual-civilian node and for context on why whole-region denominators were rejected.

title: Hundreds of Islamic State militants killed in Kobani strikes - U.S.
strengths: Confirms that only hundreds of civilians remained in town by mid-October and keeps coalition air support explicit.
limitations: Does not provide a full-episode battle death table and the fighter-killed language is broad ('around the town').
notes: Used as the second residual-civilian node and coalition-role context.

title: Rights Group: More Than 600 Killed in Fight for Kobani
author_or_org: Voice of America citing Syrian Observatory for Human Rights
strengths: Provides the cleanest located status-separated month-one fatality breakdown for the battle.
limitations: Explicitly limited to an early battle checkpoint and warns that secrecy could mean the overall death toll was much higher.
notes: Used as partial casualty context only, not as a full-episode numerator.

title: Kurds push Islamic State out of Kobani after four-month battle
strengths: Provides a clear battle-end anchor for the city-core episode.
limitations: Does not backfill the full casualty series.
notes: Used as the end-date node for person-month integration.
